title: sesamoides canescens var. spathulata
intro: Sesamoides canescens var. spathulata is a plant species belonging to the flowering plant family Asteraceae, also known as the daisy or sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and wounds. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Sesamoides canescens var. spathulata is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve in herbal medicine, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
